calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-21-2022 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Written Stipulation Of All Parties
Off Calendar Jan-13-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF DEBT MANAGEMENT PARTNERS, LLC's Motion For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Written Stipulation Of All Parties.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion for entry of judgment pursuant to written stipulation of all parties" is granted.

Order signed. Separate judgment signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)
